message:
fix(ci): proper feature-gating for cross-platform Windows build

- Make rch-common default-features = false in workspace (for cross-platform compat)
- rch and rchd explicitly enable rich-ui feature on rch-common
- Feature-gate RchTheme imports to avoid warnings when rich-ui is disabled
- This allows rch-wkr and rch-telemetry to build on Windows without rich_rust

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
